title: Monthly Sales Commission Calculator — October Close
description: RevOps analyst at CloudPulse Inc. calculates October commissions for 10 reps. CRM export has a cancelled deal, a zero-amount deal, a deal-type typo, and a 50/50 co-sell split. One rep joined mid-month (prorated quota). One rep has a clawback. One rep hits the $25,000 cap.

sheets.name: Deals
sheets.role: Raw CRM export — source data for all revenue aggregation

columns.name: DealID
columns.notes: Unique deal identifier (D-1001 to D-1047, including D-1031B for split)

columns.name: RepID
columns.notes: Foreign key to RepMaster col A (R001–R010)

columns.name: DealType
columns.notes: Valid values: New Business, Renewal, Expansion. D-1046 has typo 'New Biz'

columns.name: Amount
columns.notes: Contract value in USD. D-1047 has Amount=0

columns.name: SplitPct
columns.notes: 1.0 for sole deals; 0.5 for D-1031 (R001) and D-1031B (R005) — same contract split between two reps

columns.name: Status
columns.notes: Active or Cancelled. D-1023 (R003) is Cancelled

columns.name: AuditFlag
columns.notes: LEARNER FILLS T01. 'Include' or 'Exclude'. Exclude if: Cancelled, Amount=0, or DealType not in valid set

data_characteristics: Three deals must be excluded: D-1023 (Cancelled), D-1046 (DealType='New Biz' typo), D-1047 (Amount=0)
D-1031 and D-1031B represent the same $40,000 contract split 50/50 — two separate rows, same CloseDate, SplitPct=0.5 each
SUMPRODUCT on Amount*SplitPct correctly handles splits; plain SUMIFS on Amount would double-count D-1031 for Sarah and Jamie

sheets.name: RepMaster
sheets.role: Reference — rep attributes for lookup tasks

columns.name: RepName
columns.notes: R006 'Jordan  Lee' has a double-space — TRIM required in T02

columns.name: AnnualQuota
columns.notes: Annual quota in USD (divide by 12 for monthly)

columns.name: ProrationFactor
columns.notes: Pre-computed: 1.0 for all full-month reps; 17/31 ≈ 0.5484 for R010 (hired Oct 15)

data_characteristics: R006 'Jordan  Lee' has a literal double-space between first and last name — TRIM() in T02 removes it
R010 Alex Chen ProrationFactor = 17/31 = 0.548387... — days from Oct 15 to Oct 31 inclusive divided by 31
ProrationFactor is pre-computed to avoid DATE math complexity in Univer

sheets.name: CommissionRates
sheets.role: Reference — NB tier table (rows 2-5) and flat rates (rows 8-9)

columns.name: TierMin
columns.notes: 0, 0.5, 0.8, 1.0 — sorted ascending for VLOOKUP approx match. NULL for flat rates.

columns.name: StandardRate
columns.notes: NB rate for Standard plan per tier: 0.07/0.10/0.12/0.15

columns.name: AcceleratorRate
columns.notes: NB rate for Accelerator plan per tier: 0.08/0.12/0.15/0.18

columns.name: DealType
columns.notes: New Business for tier rows; Renewal or Expansion for flat rate rows

data_characteristics: NB tier rows 2-5 sorted ascending by TierMin — required for VLOOKUP TRUE (approximate match)
VLOOKUP(attainment, A2:C5, col, TRUE) finds the largest TierMin <= attainment
Flat rate rows 8-9: Standard Renewal 5%, Accelerator Renewal 7%, Standard Expansion 8%, Accelerator Expansion 10%
No rounding in the rates — they are exact decimals

sheets.name: Commission_Calculator
sheets.role: Learner workspace — one row per rep, columns B-K and M are formula tasks

columns.name: CommissionRate
columns.notes: T10: VLOOKUP approx match into CommissionRates NB tier table

columns.name: BaseCommission
columns.notes: T11: E*J + F*flatRenewal + G*flatExpansion, flat rates by plan type

columns.name: ClawbackAdj
columns.notes: Pre-filled: -1200 for R003 Jennifer Walsh, 0 for all others

data_characteristics: Column A (RepID) and Column L (ClawbackAdj) are pre-filled read-only
R008 Michael Torres FinalCommission is capped at 25000 (BaseCommission = 25700)

sheets.name: Settings
data_characteristics: CommissionCap is 25000 — learner can reference Settings!$B$2 or use literal 25000 in T12
Flat rates also listed here for reference but learner can hardcode them in T11

tasks.title: Flag Problem Deals
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill H2:H48 in the Deals sheet with 'Include' or 'Exclude'. Exclude a deal if Status is 'Cancelled', Amount is $0, or DealType is not one of the three valid types. All other deals should be 'Include'.

tasks.title: Look Up Rep Names (with TRIM)
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill B2:B11 with each rep's name from RepMaster. Use TRIM to clean a hidden double-space.

tasks.title: Look Up Plan Types
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill C2:C11 with each rep's plan type from RepMaster.

tasks.title: Calculate Adjusted Monthly Quota
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill D2:D11 with AnnualQuota/12 * ProrationFactor from RepMaster. One rep gets a prorated quota.

tasks.title: Sum New Business Revenue (SUMPRODUCT)
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill E2:E11 with each rep's NB revenue from included deals, multiplying Amount by SplitPct to handle splits.

tasks.title: Sum Renewal Revenue
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill F2:F11 with each rep's total Renewal revenue from included deals.

tasks.title: Sum Expansion Revenue
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill G2:G11 with each rep's total Expansion revenue from included deals. One rep returns 0 — this is correct.

tasks.title: Count Closed Deals per Rep
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill H2:H11 with each rep's count of included deals (any type).

tasks.title: Calculate Quota Attainment
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill I2:I11 with each rep's NB quota attainment as a decimal (NB Revenue / Adjusted Quota). Format as %.

tasks.title: Look Up Commission Rate (Approx Match)
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill J2:J11 with each rep's NB commission rate using VLOOKUP approximate match on the CommissionRates table. Rate column depends on plan type.

tasks.title: Calculate Base Commission
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill K2:K11 with total base commission: NB×rate + Renewal×flat + Expansion×flat. Flat rates differ by plan type.

tasks.title: Apply Cap and Clawback for Final Commission
tasks.controllerAsk: Fill M2:M11 with final commission = MIN(BaseCommission + ClawbackAdj, 25000). Col L is pre-filled with clawback amounts.
